hero_subtitle: SFTY provides leadership with a unified compliance control layer that consolidates fragmented workflows into audit-ready, scalable processes for managing operational risk.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Operational risk grows with fragmented workflows
problem_description: Executives face declining visibility as compliance activities scatter across disconnected tools and manual processes. This fragmentation slows decision making, weakens audit readiness and increases the risk of inconsistent, hard-to-defend compliance outcomes.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates provider outputs, case workflows, decision logs and evidence into a unified operational layer that improves visibility and strengthens audit readiness for executive risk control.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to operational risk control
workflow_description: SFTY structures provider checks and alerts into a connected workflow that supports consistent decisions and audit evidence for managing compliance risk.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented workflows. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented compliance inputs into one unified operational layer delivering audit-ready decisions, clear risk visibility, and streamlined control for executive risk management.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP leaders with integrated provider orchestration, audit-grade evidence and scalable deployment to reduce operational compliance risk and enhance oversight visibility.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY reduce operational risk for compliance teams
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY improves audit trails and evidence tracking
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how compliance workflows connect KYC KYB and KYT data

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives a connected compliance operating layer to reduce operational risk, improve decision visibility, and strengthen audit readiness across digital asset workflows and teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented compliance tools?
faq_2_answer: SFTY consolidates provider outputs, regulatory rules, cases and decisions into one structured workflow, reducing manual handoffs and improving risk oversight across onboarding, KYT, Travel Rule and reporting.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and supporting evidence packages, enabling audit-ready review and clear traceability between compliance actions and regulatory requirements.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with our existing compliance stack?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY can connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and reporting providers without replacing them, supporting a layered approach within existing compliance ecosystems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above existing providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions and reports without replacing the underlying compliance service providers.
final_title: Turn fragmented workflows into one audit-ready layer
final_description: See how SFTY helps VASP executives connect compliance workflows, improve risk visibility and prepare audit-ready evidence across operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
